Book Appointment

Procedures

Artisan Clinic is a modern plastic surgery and aesthetic medicine clinic in Warsaw. Our name is no coincidence — it derives from two words important to us: art and sanatio, meaning healing. Artisan is a name that reflects our sense of aesthetics, harmony, beauty, precision, and respect for patient health.

Face Body Breasts Skin

Face

Deep Plane Face Lift

A surgical face lift designed for mature patients experiencing facial skin laxity that does not qualify for correction with fat tissue transfer or thread insertion.

Learn More

Thread Lift with Permanent or Absorbable Aptos Threads

Thread lift with permanent or absorbable Aptos threads is designed for patients with mild tissue sagging. The procedure is minimally invasive, short, most often performed under local anesthesia, with minimal post-procedure swelling. This allows the patient to quickly return to normal activities while achieving a reliable and predictable result. Depending on the patient's needs or preferences, Aptos threads with temporary (approx. 2 years) or permanent effect are used.

Learn More

Eyelid Surgery (Blepharoplasty)

Eyelid correction is designed for patients who wish to rejuvenate their face and gaze. The procedure achieves a lighter, younger, and more rested appearance of the eyes.

Learn More

Rhinoplasty

Rhinoplasty is most often sought by patients dissatisfied with the shape of their nosee. The procedure may involve the cartilaginous part of the nosee, which forms the tip and nosetrils. It allows reshaping of the nasal tip and contouring of this area. Surgery on the cartilaginous part can be performed under local anesthesia, resulting in an easier and shorter recovery. Depending on the scope of the procedure and the desired outcome, Dr. Witwicki selects the appropriate surgical method.

Learn More

Nose Correction with Aptos Threads

The use of Aptos threads in aesthetic medicine is the result of many years of work by experienced plastic surgeons. As a rule, Aptos threads are recommended to prevent ptosis, i.e., tissue sagging (anti-ptosis, hence the name Aptos). The thread method can also be used to correct the nasal tip.

Learn More

Nose Correction with Hyaluronic Acid

This method of nosee correction is designed for patients interested in a subtle correction that adds volume and lifts sagging tissues, such as the nasal tip or the nasofrontal angle. The advantage of nosee correction with hyaluronic acid is its minimal invasiveness and the ability to shape the nosee.

Learn More

Dynamic Wrinkle Correction with Botulinum Toxin

A recognized and widely used method for eliminating wrinkles caused by facial expressions. One of the advantages of this treatment is its safety and predictability of results. Importantly, this procedure requires no recovery time, meaning you can return to normal activities immediately after treatment.

Learn More

Facial Volumetry with Hyaluronic Acid

A procedure designed for middle-aged patients who have experienced a decrease in fat tissue volume, as well as mild tissue sagging and loss of firmness. The result is a younger appearance, improved facial contour, and restored tissue volume in the desired areas.

Learn More

Lip Augmentation with Hyaluronic Acid

This procedure is designed for patients who wish to enhance and accentuate their lips. The main advantages of this lip augmentation method are predictable results, quick recovery, and minimal invasiveness.

Learn More

Stem Cells: Lipogems® – Facial Rejuvenation and Revitalization

Lipogems® is an innovative method for obtaining fat tissue with a high content of stem cells, allowing it to be administered as a filler. For the patient, this means minimal post-operative swelling, improved volume, reduction of skin inflammation, revitalization, and improved circulation. We were the first in Poland to perform Lipogems® procedures in aesthetic medicine.

Learn More

Prominent Ear Correction (Otoplasty)

Otoplasty is a minimally invasive procedure that leaves no visible scars and corrects a very noticeable defect in ear shape. Ear correction helps eliminate an unfavorable appearance and, consequently, improve self-esteem. Even children from the age of 7 who are aware of and wish to correct this condition may qualify for the procedure.

Learn More

Earlobe Repair

The most common reason for earlobe correction is tearing caused by wearing earrings, or a significantly abnormal size or shape of the earlobe. This is a minimally invasive procedure that delivers good results.

Learn More

Botox – Migraine Treatment

We offer migraine headache treatment. The effect of the therapy (injecting sensitive points with Botox) lasts several months. A thorough diagnoseis of the condition is required before undergoing the procedure.

Learn More

Endermolift™ 2 – Rejuvenation Treatments

A 100% natural, anti-wrinkle and rejuvenating technique for women and men of all ages. It significantly improves skin condition by reducing wrinkles and stimulating collagen production.

Learn More

Laser Photorejuvenation (IPL Laser)

How can you maintain a youthful and healthy skin appearance for years? Throughout the year, we expose our skin to various weather conditions. Sun exposure is particularly damaging. Intensive tanning usually leaves marks on the face and decolletage that can sometimes be difficult to conceal even with light makeup. Similar discolorations also appear over time on the backs of the hands. How to deal with them? Laser photorejuvenation helps even out skin tone, remove unsightly discolorations, and visibly rejuvenate the skin.

Learn More

Lipolysis – Chin

Chin lipolysis is performed on patients with excessive chin fat tissue. It is an ideal solution for those who are hesitant about surgical intervention (liposuction).

Learn More

Needle Mesotherapy

Needle mesotherapy is often called the “youth injection” — it is one of the most valued aesthetic medicine procedures. Depending on the indications, it nourishes and revitalizes the skin of the face and body, has anti-cellulite effects, and reduces wrinkles.

Learn More

Stem Cell Mesotherapy

A procedure designed for patients who wish to significantly improve the condition and appearance of their facial skin in a non-invasive way.

Learn More

Microneedling Mesotherapy (microPen)

MicroPen microneedling therapy stimulates the natural regeneration process by creating microscopic punctures, which accelerates tissue repair. It also enables absorption of active ingredients in applied preparations with moisturizing, nourishing, and firming properties (amino acids, peptides, antioxidants, vitamins, microelements).

Learn More

Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) Treatment – Face/Neck/Decolletage

PRP regenerative therapy is a modern, skin-rejuvenating anti-aging procedure that stimulates the patient's own tissue regeneration potential. The procedure aims to tighten, smooth the skin, and improve its texture and tone.

Learn More

Redermalization – New Anti-Aging Treatment

Redermalization is a new method of aging prevention and skin renewal. Thanks to innovative Xela Rederm® preparations by the Swiss company Hyalual, containing sodium succinate and hyaluronic acid, biochemical and physiological processes in cells are regulated. The procedure effectively blocks free radical formation and prevents skin dehydration. Redermalization is applied to the face, neck, decolletage, hands, and under the eyes.

Learn More

Resurfacing (FRAX 1550 Laser) – Skin Densification

Resurfacing is a procedure that, through laser action, safely removes the outer layer of skin (the epidermis). The goal is to rejuvenate the skin by removing the damaged layer.

Learn More

Facial Implant Insertion

This procedure is designed for patients requiring augmentation of bone or tissue volume, most commonly in the area of the zygomatic arches, around the base of the nosee, or the chin.

Learn More

Tumor Excision

Lesions qualified for excision after dermoscopic examination should be removed. In difficult cases, we provide a team: oncologist + plastic surgeon. The oncologist ensures the lesion is properly assessed and excised with an appropriate, safe margin, while the plastic surgeon carefully closes the wound with attention to the aesthetic outcome.

Learn More

VECTUS™ – Facial Laser Hair Removal (for Women and Men)

VECTUS™ is the safest laser hair removal method available on the market. Results are visible after the very first treatment. Finally, you can safely and painlessly get rid of unwanted hair.

Learn More

Facial Nerve Palsy – Aptos Threads

Correction of facial asymmetry resulting from facial nerve palsy using Aptos threads is an effective method for improving facial tissue aesthetics after facial nerve palsy. It can be performed when there is no prospect of spontaneous improvement, at least 2 years after the injury.

Learn More

Wrinkle Reduction with Hyaluronic Acid

We invite you to take advantage of treatments using hyaluronic acid, often called the “elixir of youth.” Injection of this preparation, successfully used in aesthetic medicine for many years, delivers good and predictable results within just a few days, and recovery is usually very short (1-2 days) and mild. Hyaluronic acid can be used to shape and enhance the lips, contour the face, and fill static wrinkles.

Learn More

Thread Lift with Permanent or Absorbable Aptos Threads

Thread lift with permanent or absorbable Aptos threads, the so-called scalpel-free lift, is designed for patients with mild tissue sagging. The procedure is minimally invasive, short, performed under local anesthesia, with minimal post-procedure swelling. This allows the patient to quickly return to normal activities while achieving a reliable and predictable result. Depending on the patient's needs or preferences, Aptos threads with temporary (approx. 2 years) or permanent effect are used.

Learn More

Facial Contouring with Algeness Natural Agarose-Based Filler

Algeness is an innovative, 100% natural filler composed of agarose, a plant-derived substance. It is fully biodegradable, safe, and free of synthetic additives such as BDDE or PEG. This reduces the risk of swelling and allergic reactions.

Learn More

Body

Liposuction with Skin Tightening – Laser Fat Removal

Liposuction with simultaneous skin tightening is a modern body contouring method based on laser fat tissue reduction. It is less invasive than traditional liposuction while being equally effective. The use of different wavelengths that selectively target fat and skin tissue achieves an even and effective result.

Learn More

Argo Plasma – Skin Tightening

After significant weight loss or liposuction, loose skin can become an issue. Thanks to breakthrough argon plasma technology, we can safely and effectively tighten, increase tension, and improve skin firmness.

Learn More

Tummy Tuck (Abdominoplasty)

A tummy tuck (abdominoplasty) is a procedure that restores the desired abdominal appearance, for example after pregnancy or significant weight loss. It aims to remove excess sagging skin, and when combined with simultaneous liposuction, also reduces the amount of fat tissue in the abdominal area.

Learn More

Fat Transfer (Lipotransfer)

With age or as a result of illness/accidents, certain areas of the body or face may lack volume and shape. An excellent solution in such cases is fat transfer (lipotransfer) or fat filling (lipofilling) using various methods, such as the Puregraft method.

Learn More

Calf Augmentation (with Implants)

Calf augmentation is performed on patients with calf asymmetry or significant muscle underdevelopment. It allows for increased volume and/or symmetry correction.

Learn More

Arm Lift (Brachioplasty)

A procedure for patients who have experienced significant weight loss and/or sagging arm tissue. It restores proper arm contour and skin firmness.

Learn More

Thigh Lift

This procedure is designed for patients who have experienced significant weight loss or after extensive liposuction of the lower limbs. It restores proper thigh contour and skin firmness.

Learn More

Labiaplasty

Enlarged labia can be a source of insecurity for many women. This procedure, performed under local anesthesia, quickly and effectively resolves this intimate concern.

Learn More

Botox – Migraine Treatment

We offer migraine headache treatment. The effect of the therapy (injecting sensitive points with Botox) lasts several months. A thorough diagnoseis of the condition is required before undergoing the procedure.

Learn More

Endermologie: LPG® Lipomassage™

Endermologie: LPG® Lipomassage™ is an innovative fat tissue reduction method that naturally eliminates localized fat deposits. Endermologie treatments stimulate lipolysis and encourage collagen production, resulting in not only losing excess centimeters but also gaining firmer skin.

Learn More

Phlebology: Spider Veins, Varicose Veins

Varicose veins and spider veins are a common condition affecting many people, regardless of gender. We offer a range of methods for safely resolving this troublesome problem. Available treatments include: laser therapy, sclerotherapy, miniphlebectomy, and surgical treatment of varicose veins.

Learn More

Regenerative Cells: Lipogems® – Hand Rejuvenation

Lipogems® is an innovative method for obtaining fat tissue with a high content of regenerative cells, allowing it to be administered as a filler. For the patient, this means minimal post-operative swelling, improved volume, reduction of skin inflammation, revitalization, and improved circulation. We were the first in Poland to perform Lipogems® procedures in aesthetic medicine.

Learn More

Body Contouring with Aqualyx

Aqualyx is used for localized body contouring. If the patient has minor excess fat deposits, this solution can be very effective. It is applicable for issues such as an overly prominent chin or localized abdominal fat. You can lose even several centimeters.

Learn More

Abdominal Hernia Surgery

A hernia is a protrusion of the peritoneum (the membrane surrounding the abdominal organs) in the form of a visible “sac” in the abdominal wall. They develop in areas where other tissues (muscles, fascia) are too weak to keep the internal organs, primarily the intestines, in place within the abdominal cavity. Surgical hernia treatment resolves the problem.

Learn More

Orthopedics: Joint Regeneration with Stem Cells

A procedure designed for patients diagnoseed with degenerative joint disease. It serves to regenerate and repair damaged joint cartilage and tissues, and to reduce inflammation and joint pain.

Learn More

Hand Surgery

At our clinic, we also offer hand surgery procedures. We surgically treat common conditions such as carpal tunnel syndrome, which causes finger numbness and nighttime hand pain.

Learn More

Laser Hair Removal – VECTUS™

VECTUS™ hair removal is a procedure performed using the most advanced, effective, and safe diode laser. The Vectus™ laser offers maximum safety, effectiveness, and comfort. Thanks to this modern device, laser hair removal is easier and faster than ever before.

Learn More

Tumor Excision

Lesions qualified for excision after dermoscopic examination should be removed. In difficult cases, we provide a team: oncologist + plastic surgeon. The oncologist ensures the lesion is properly assessed and excised with an appropriate, safe margin, while the plastic surgeon carefully closes the wound with attention to the aesthetic outcome.

Learn More

Spider Veins (Telangiectasia)

Spider veins (telangiectasia) are a common condition affecting many people, regardless of gender. We offer a range of methods for safely resolving this troublesome problem. Our services include laser treatments for vascular lesion reduction and sclerotherapy. Phlebological procedures at our clinic are performed by an experienced vascular surgeon, Dr. Andrzej Cichocki, MD, PhD.

Learn More

Breasts

Breast Augmentation with Implants

Breast augmentation with implants is the most popular plastic surgery procedure. Thanks to the wide range of implants we offer, excellent and aesthetic results can be achieved while maintaining maximum safety. We use implants exclusively from proven manufacturers who meet the strictest quality and durability criteria (lifetime manufacturer warranty, etc.).

Learn More

Breast Augmentation with Own Fat

This method is an alternative to breast augmentation with implants. It is most often chosen by women who do not want or cannot carry a foreign body in the form of an implant, or patients who wish to slightly and naturally enlarge their breasts.

Learn More

Breast Lift (Mastopexy)

This procedure restores a beautiful breast shape, for example after pregnancy and breastfeeding.

Learn More

Breast Lift with APTOS Threads (Subcutaneous Bra)

Breast lift with APTOS threads restores a beautiful breast shape, for example after pregnancy and breastfeeding. It can be performed on women with cup sizes up to a small C. The use of APTOS threads in breast lifting provides a predictable and safe result, helping to restore a youthful breast appearance without a scalpel.

Learn More

Breast Reduction

Breast reduction is designed for women with overly large breasts. It safely reduces breast size while preserving their natural shape.

Learn More

Inverted Nipple Correction

This procedure resolves the problem of inverted nipples. It is performed under local anesthesia, allowing for very quick recovery and an immediate return to daily activities.

Learn More

Breast Reconstruction

Breast reconstruction after cancer is an important part of a patient's return to daily life. There are many methods of breast reconstruction. The goal is to restore a natural-looking breast in one or, depending on the method, several reconstructive procedures.

Learn More

Mastectomy with Immediate Reconstruction

Immediate breast reconstruction after skin-sparing mastectomy due to BRCA1/BRCA2 gene mutation is performed on patients carrying a gene that increases the risk of breast cancer.

Learn More

Breast Reconstruction with Expander-Prosthesis

Breast reconstruction with an expander-prosthesis allows the breast to be reconstructed in a single surgical procedure.

Learn More

Breast Reconstruction with Own Tissue

In some cases, reconstruction with the patient's own tissue (a flap from the back or abdomen) is the only reconstruction method available. This is a solution for women who have undergone radiotherapy. It achieves excellent results and a natural-looking breast.

Learn More

Breast Reconstruction with Own Fat

Breast reconstruction with the patient's own fat is an alternative for women who are concerned about major plastic surgery, do not want a foreign body in the form of silicone implants, or cannot have an implant inserted due to previous radiotherapy.

Learn More

For Men: Gynecomastia

For many men, breast gland enlargement or fatty male breast enlargement is a significant problem. Gynecomastia surgery resolves the issue once and for all, restoring a flat chest.

Learn More

Skin

Skin Revitalization with Stem Cells

Stem cells help the skin regain freshness and vitality. Treatments using stem cells for skin revitalization deliver excellent results.

Learn More

VECTUS™ – Safe Laser Hair Removal

VECTUS™ hair removal is a procedure performed using the most advanced, effective, and safe diode laser. The Vectus™ laser offers maximum safety, effectiveness, and comfort. Thanks to this modern device, laser hair removal is easier and faster than ever before.

Learn More

Mole Removal

Moles often disfigure or cause discomfort, being additionally prone to mechanical damage (e.g., at the waistband, etc.). This simple procedure helps restore confidence and comfort.

Learn More

Mole Removal with Local Flap Repair

When removing larger lesions, local flap repair is necessary to achieve the most aesthetically pleasing surgical site.

Learn More

Tumor Excision

Lesions qualified for excision after dermoscopic examination should be removed. In difficult cases, we provide a team: oncologist + plastic surgeon. The oncologist ensures the lesion is properly assessed and excised with an appropriate, safe margin, while the plastic surgeon carefully closes the wound with attention to the aesthetic outcome.

Learn More

Laser Photorejuvenation (IPL Laser)

How can you maintain a youthful and healthy skin appearance for years? Throughout the year, we expose our skin to various weather conditions. Sun exposure is particularly damaging. Intensive tanning usually leaves marks on the face and decolletage that can sometimes be difficult to conceal even with light makeup. Similar discolorations also appear over time on the backs of the hands. How to deal with them? Laser photorejuvenation helps even out skin tone, remove unsightly discolorations, and visibly rejuvenate the skin.

Learn More

Endermolift™ 2 – Rejuvenation Treatment

A 100% natural, anti-wrinkle and rejuvenating technique for women and men of all ages. It significantly improves skin condition by reducing wrinkles and stimulating collagen production.

Learn More

Phlebology: Spider Veins, Varicose Veins

Varicose veins and spider veins are a common condition affecting many people, regardless of gender. We offer a range of methods for safely resolving this troublesome problem. Available treatments include: laser therapy, sclerotherapy, miniphlebectomy, and surgical treatment of varicose veins.

Learn More

Stem Cells: Lipogems® – Skin Revitalization

We were the first in Poland to use Lipogems® technology in plastic surgery and aesthetic medicine procedures. The method of obtaining fat tissue with a high content of stem cells enables significant revitalization and rejuvenation of treated areas, such as the hands or facial skin. The procedure is minimally invasive, and results are visible immediately.

Learn More

Surgical Scar Correction

Surgical scar correction involves excising the old scar, in place of which a new, more aesthetically pleasing one forms.

Learn More

Needle Mesotherapy

Needle mesotherapy is often called the “youth injection” — it is one of the most valued aesthetic medicine procedures. Depending on the indications, it nourishes and revitalizes the skin of the face and body, has anti-cellulite effects, and reduces wrinkles.

Learn More

Microneedling Mesotherapy

MicroPen microneedling therapy stimulates the natural regeneration process by creating microscopic punctures, which accelerates tissue repair. It also enables absorption of active ingredients in applied preparations with moisturizing, nourishing, and firming properties (amino acids, peptides, antioxidants, vitamins, microelements).

Learn More

Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) Mesotherapy

PRP regenerative therapy is a modern, skin-rejuvenating anti-aging procedure that stimulates the patient's own tissue regeneration potential. The procedure aims to tighten, smooth the skin, and improve its texture and tone.

Learn More

Redermalization – New Anti-Aging Treatment

Redermalization is a new method of aging prevention and skin renewal. Thanks to innovative Xela Rederm® preparations by the Swiss company Hyalual, containing sodium succinate and hyaluronic acid, biochemical and physiological processes in cells are regulated. The procedure effectively blocks free radical formation and prevents skin dehydration. Redermalization is applied to the face, neck, decolletage, hands, and under the eyes.

Learn More
